data.title: Elon Musk Criticizes Cryptocurrency Amid OpenAI Lawsuit
data.description:
Elon Musk, during a court hearing related to his lawsuit with OpenAI, stated that while some cryptocurrencies hold value, the majority are scams. According to Odaily, this comment was made during cross-examination at the Oakland, California court, where the case involved OpenAI's early consideration of raising funds through an Initial Coin Offering (ICO).

Reports indicate that Musk highlighted the speculative and fraudulent activities prevalent in the crypto asset sector, drawing significant market attention.

Musk's stance on the cryptocurrency market has been notably volatile. In 2021, during the bull market, he influenced Tesla to purchase approximately $1.5 billion in Bitcoin and frequently mentioned Dogecoin, causing significant price surges in related assets. However, in 2022, Tesla reduced its Bitcoin holdings by 75% and recorded an impairment of about $222 million on the remaining holdings in the first quarter of 2026. As per the latest financial report, Tesla still holds approximately 11,509 Bitcoins, with a book value of around $786 million.

data.title: Benchmark strongly supports the Strategy STRC model: it's not a circular funding mechanism, but a long-term funding engine for Bitcoin.
data.description: The debate surrounding Strategy's financing model of continuously increasing its Bitcoin holdings through preferred stock STRC continues to widen. In a recent report, Benchmark analyst Mark Palmer stated that the interpretation of the STRC model as a "circular financing or Ponzi scheme" is a "serious misinterpretation," emphasizing that the mechanism is an "intentionally designed and sustainable capital framework" whose core logic is to translate market demand for returns into long-term Bitcoin exposure. According to SEC 8-K filings, Strategy raised approximately $3.5 billion in the first three weeks of April, with over 85% coming from STRC issuance. In the following three weeks, it purchased a total of 51,364 Bitcoins in three separate transactions, worth approximately $3.9 billion. Currently, Strategy's Bitcoin holdings have increased to 818,334, with a market capitalization of approximately $62.5 billion, and have recently returned to a floating profit of approximately $700 million. Benchmark believes that this structure does not rely on continuous issuance to operate and could even pay preferred stock dividends if necessary by selling a portion of the Bitcoin. However, significant skepticism remains in the market, with some arguing that selling off leveraged assets to pay dividends could be seen as a risk signal, triggering broader market pressure. (The Block)

data.title: White House Considers Increasing U.S. Oil Production
data.description: The White House National Economic Council Director, Kevin Hassett, announced plans to potentially increase U.S. oil production. According to Odaily, Hassett emphasized ongoing communication with oil companies to explore ways to boost domestic production.

data.title: Kelp Completes Funding Commitment to DeFi United Recovery Fund
data.description:
Kelp has announced the completion of its funding commitment to the 'DeFi United' recovery fund, contributing a total of 2,000 ETH. According to Odaily, this investment aims to facilitate the restoration of rsETH collateral assets and the normalization of the system.

Kelp stated that the contribution is a one-time investment, directly allocated to restoring the nominal exchange rate of rsETH with its underlying assets. It will also support the comprehensive repair of the system, including recapitalizing bridge vaults, restoring oracle functions, and addressing funding gaps in affected markets. Kelp emphasized that prior to the public announcement, it had assured rsETH holders that they would not incur losses, and this action is a direct fulfillment of that promise. As funds from various parties are gradually secured, the rsETH collateral structure will be restored to normal operation in phases.

data.title: ECB Likely to Raise Interest Rates Amid Energy Concerns
data.description: European Central Bank (ECB) policymakers are expected to increase interest rates at their upcoming meeting in June. Bloomberg posted on X that this decision hinges on the absence of positive developments regarding energy prices and the resolution of the Iran war. The ECB's stance reflects ongoing concerns about inflationary pressures driven by energy costs and geopolitical tensions. The central bank aims to address these challenges through monetary policy adjustments, with the potential rate hike being a key measure under consideration.

data.title: Elon Musk's claim during the OpenAI lawsuit trial that "most cryptocurrencies are scams" has once again drawn market attention.
data.description: During his lawsuit against OpenAI, Elon Musk stated that "some cryptocurrencies have value, but most are scams." This statement came during cross-examination in an Oakland, California court, when the case concerned OpenAI's early plans to raise funds through an ICO (Initial Coin Offering). Musk reportedly pointed out in court that there is a lot of speculation and fraud in the crypto asset space, drawing market attention. It's worth noting that Musk's attitude towards the crypto market has fluctuated significantly over the years: during the 2021 bull market, he pushed Tesla to purchase approximately $1.5 billion worth of Bitcoin and repeatedly mentioned Dogecoin publicly, driving a significant increase in the price of related assets. However, Tesla reduced its Bitcoin holdings by 75% in 2022 and recorded an impairment loss of approximately $222 million on the remaining holdings in the first quarter of 2026. As of the latest financial report, it still holds approximately 11,509 Bitcoins, with a book value of approximately $786 million. (Fortune)

data.title: U.S. Senator Criticizes Trump's War Strategy
data.description: A leading Democratic member of the U.S. Senate Armed Services Committee has criticized U.S. President Donald Trump for lacking a coherent strategy on war-related issues. According to Odaily, the senator expressed concerns that the current strategic situation of the United States is worse than before the outbreak of war. The senator also noted that the Iranian regime continues to pose a threat to American interests.

data.title: Trump Administration Official Suggests Private Lenders Aid Spirit Airlines
data.description: A senior official from the Trump administration has indicated that private lenders could play a crucial role in supporting Spirit Airlines as it faces operational challenges. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that these lenders might assist the airline while discussions for a potential rescue package from the U.S. government are underway. Spirit Airlines has been experiencing financial difficulties, prompting the need for external support to maintain its operations. The involvement of private lenders could provide the necessary relief as negotiations continue.

data.title: Bubblemaps: 8360 addresses received MEGA token airdrops, 40% have been sold.
data.description: On-chain analytics platform Bubblemaps released the latest data on the X platform, showing that the MEGA airdrop covered a total of 8,360 wallet addresses. The distribution shows that 50% of wallets still hold all the airdropped tokens, 40% have sold all of them, and 10% have partially reduced their holdings. The current fully diluted valuation (FDV) of MEGA is approximately $1.7 billion.

data.title: Iranian President: Iran has completely lost trust in the United States
data.description: Iranian President Peskhov said in a phone call with Belarusian President Alexander Lukashenko on Tuesday that Iran has completely lost trust in the United States. Peskhov said that resolving differences through dialogue and diplomatic efforts has always been a priority, but the two attacks on Iran by the United States and Israel during previous negotiations, and the possibility of similar actions happening again, have led to Iran's complete loss of trust in the United States. (Xinhua)

data.title: Democratic members of the U.S. Senate Armed Services Committee criticized Trump for lacking consistency in his war strategy.
data.description: The ranking Democrat on the Senate Armed Services Committee stated that Trump lacks a coherent strategy on war, and that the U.S. is currently in a worse strategic position than before the outbreak of war, with the Iranian regime consistently posing a threat to U.S. interests. (Jinshi)

data.title: ECB President Lagarde Rejects 'Stagflation' Label for Eurozone's Current Challenges
data.description:
On April 30, European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde addressed the media following a policy decision, stating that the term 'stagflation' should not be used to describe the current economic challenges facing the Eurozone. According to Jin10, Lagarde emphasized that the combination of inflation risks and weak growth does not equate to the severe economic conditions of the 1970s. She noted that while discussions about stagflation are popular and cause widespread anxiety, the term accurately describes the 1970s and should remain associated with that era.

U.S. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell expressed a similar viewpoint last month, describing the 1970s as a 'more severe situation.' Lagarde further clarified that the current situation is 'completely different,' highlighting that inflation in the 1970s was persistent and stable, unemployment rates were extremely high, and the monetary and fiscal frameworks were entirely different from today. Therefore, she argued against using the 'fancy term' of stagflation for the present circumstances.

Lagarde assured that the ECB's framework is robust and its determination strong enough to bring inflation back to 2%. She contrasted this with the 1970s, when inflation was never tamed.

data.title: Solana ecosystem revenue trading platform Exponent has raised $5 million in seed funding, led by Multicoin Capital.
data.description: Exponent Finance, a Solana-based yield trading platform, announced the completion of a $5 million seed funding round led by Multicoin Capital, with participation from Solana Ventures, RockawayX, L1D, Prelude, and Theia Blockchain, as well as angel investors including several key figures from the Solana ecosystem. This round of financing, initiated in May of last year and completed in August, brings Exponent's total funding to $7.1 million. Exponent stated that the funds will be used to expand its yield trading platform and upgrade it to a more complete on-chain yield infrastructure, covering the active yield management needs of the Solana ecosystem. (The Block)

data.title: Exponent Finance Secures $5 Million in Seed Funding
data.description: Exponent Finance, a yield trading platform based on Solana, has announced the completion of a $5 million seed funding round. According to Odaily, the round was led by Multicoin Capital, with participation from Solana Ventures, RockawayX, L1D, Prelude, and Theia Blockchain, as well as several key figures from the Solana ecosystem as angel investors. The funding round began in May of last year and concluded in August, bringing Exponent's total funding to $7.1 million. Exponent plans to use the funds to expand its yield trading platform and upgrade to a more comprehensive on-chain yield infrastructure to meet the active yield management needs within the Solana ecosystem.

data.title: Kelp contributed 2,000 ETH to the DeFi United Recovery Fund to aid rsETH recovery.
data.description: Kelp announced that it has completed its committed contribution of 2,000 ETH to the "DeFi United" recovery fund to facilitate the recovery of rsETH collateral and the normalization of the system. Kelp stated that this one-time contribution will directly restore the notional exchange rate between rsETH and the underlying asset and support a comprehensive system repair, including the recapitulation of bridging treasuries, restoration of oracle functionality, and filling funding gaps in affected markets. Kelp added that it had promised rsETH holders no losses prior to the public announcement and emphasized that this action is a direct manifestation of fulfilling that promise. As funds gradually arrive, the rsETH collateral structure will be restored to normal operation in phases.

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF saw a net outflow of 1,725 ​​BTC, and the Ethereum ETF saw a net outflow of 41,275 ETH.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, today the US Bitcoin ETF saw a net outflow of 1,725 ​​BTC, the Ethereum ETF saw a net outflow of 41,275 ETH, and the Solana ETF saw a net inflow of 1,465 SOL.

data.title: White House Economic Director Predicts Potential Oil Price Drop
data.description: White House National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett stated that U.S. President Donald Trump has effectively countered OPEC's influence, suggesting that oil prices could significantly decrease as long as the Strait of Hormuz remains accessible. According to NS3.AI, Hassett also highlighted the strength of today's GDP data. Meanwhile, Kevin Warsh emphasized that future decisions would be guided by data, without offering any guarantees.

data.title: Expert Highlights Sui's Blockchain Model and Token Supply
data.description: Josh Olszewicz of Canary Capital described Sui as a consumer-oriented Layer-1 blockchain with a capped maximum supply of 10 billion SUI tokens. According to NS3.AI, Olszewicz noted that Sui employs an object-based model to facilitate parallel transaction execution. The blockchain's total value locked reached approximately $2 billion in October 2025 before declining to $600 million.

data.title: Iran-Linked Vessels Navigate Strait of Hormuz Amid Blockades
data.description: A few vessels linked to Iran are currently navigating the Strait of Hormuz, a critical waterway that remains largely inaccessible to international shipping due to blockades imposed by Tehran and the United States. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the ongoing tensions in the region that have led to significant disruptions in maritime traffic. The Strait of Hormuz is a vital passage for global oil shipments, and its closure has raised concerns over potential impacts on international energy markets. The situation underscores the geopolitical complexities in the area, as both Iran and the U.S. maintain a strong presence, affecting the flow of goods and resources. The developments in the Strait of Hormuz continue to be closely monitored by global stakeholders, given its strategic importance in international trade.

data.title: Several U.S. senators wrote to Tether CEO regarding the Lutnick loan.
data.description: According to market sources, several U.S. senators have written to the CEO of Tether regarding Lutnick's loan, and the senators have also written to Lutnick about the loan to his family trust. (Jinshi)
